scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/core build && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/db build && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/extension build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/core test && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/db test && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/web test && corepack pnpm --filter @human-layer/extension test
